mapper.select: /* wms-inbound-order-return-sql-oracle.xml - selectInterfaceInboundHeaderReturn - 입고 반품 헤더 수신 인터페이스 조회 */ SELECT CTKEY , OWKEY , ORHDKEY , CUSTORDNO , EXTORDERKEY , RECALLERNM , RECALLERZIPCD , RECALLERADDR1 , RECALLERADDR2 , RECALLERTELNO1 , RECALLERTELNO2 , RIRSNCD , RIDTRSNCONT , RECALLERIYN , CMT1 , CMT2 , PRCSYN , PRCSDATE , RCVDATE , INSERTDATE , INSERTURKEY , UPDATEDATE , UPDATEURKEY FROM TWORK_INTF_RET_HD_RCV WHERE CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND OWKEY = #{owkey} AND CUSTORDNO = #{custordno} AND EXTORDERKEY = #{extorderkey}

/* wms-inbound-order-return-sql-oracle.xml - selectInterfaceInboundHeaderList - 입고 반품 헤더 수신 인터페이스 - 등록 대상 조회 */ SELECT CTKEY , OWKEY , ORHDKEY , CUSTORDNO , EXTORDERKEY , RECALLERNM , RECALLERZIPCD , RECALLERADDR1 , RECALLERADDR2 , RECALLERTELNO1 , RECALLERTELNO2 , RIRSNCD , RIDTRSNCONT , RECALLERIYN , CMT1 , CMT2 , PRCSYN , PRCSDATE , RCVDATE , INSERTDATE , INSERTURKEY , UPDATEDATE , UPDATEURKEY FROM TWORK_INTF_RET_HD_RCV WHERE CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND OWKEY = #{owkey} AND PRCSYN = 'N' AND TO_DATE(RCVDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') + INTERVAL '1' DAY > CURRENT_TIMESTAMP

/* wms-inbound-order-return-sql-oracle.xml - selectInterfaceInboundDetailList - 입고 반품 상세 수신 인터페이스 - 등록 대상 조회 */ SELECT CTKEY , OWKEY , ORHDKEY , ORDTKEY , DLVRYCORPCD , WBLNO , ICKEY , INITQTY , EXPCTQTY , UOM , PRCSYN , PRCSDATE , RCVDATE , INSERTDATE , INSERTURKEY , UPDATEDATE , UPDATEURKEY FROM TWORK_INTF_RET_DT_RCV WHERE CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND OWKEY = #{owkey} AND ORHDKEY = #{orhdkey}

/* wms-inbound-order-return-sql-oracle.xml - selectInterfaceInboundWblList - 입고 반품 운송장 수신 인터페이스 - 등록 대상 조회 */ SELECT CTKEY , OWKEY , ORHDKEY , DLVRYCORPCD , WBLNO , PRCSYN , PRCSDATE , RCVDATE , INSERTDATE , INSERTURKEY , UPDATEDATE , UPDATEURKEY FROM TWORK_INTF_RET_WBL_RCV WHERE CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND OWKEY = #{owkey} AND ORHDKEY = #{orhdkey}

/* wms-inbound-order-return-sql-oracle.xml - selectInterfaceInboundFileList - 입고 반품 파일 수신 인터페이스 - 등록 대상 조회 */ SELECT CTKEY , OWKEY , ORHDKEY , IMGSEQ AS SEQNO , IMGURL , PRCSYN , PRCSDATE , RCVDATE , INSERTDATE , INSERTURKEY , UPDATEDATE , UPDATEURKEY FROM TWORK_INTF_RET_CUST_FILE WHERE CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND OWKEY = #{owkey} AND ORHDKEY = #{orhdkey}

/* wms-inbound-order-return-sql-oracle.xml - selectInboundDetailList - 입고 상세 조회 */ SELECT CTKEY , OWKEY , IBHDKEY , DLVRYCORPCD , WBLNO , ICKEY , TRUNC(IBDTKEY::NUMERIC, -2) AS DTKEY , COALESCE(IBQTY, 0) + COALESCE(DMGQTY, 0) + COALESCE(FOODDMGQTY, 0) + COALESCE(DFCQTY, 0) + COALESCE(DONAQTY, 0) AS QTY /* 수량(반품입고수량) */ , IBQTY AS AVQTY /* 가용(예정)수량 */ , COALESCE(DMGQTY, 0) + COALESCE(FOODDMGQTY, 0) + COALESCE(DFCQTY, 0) + COALESCE(DONAQTY, 0) AS NAVQTY /* 불용수량 */ , IBQTY /* 정상입고수량 */ , DMGQTY /* 파손수량 */ , FOODDMGQTY /* 식품파손수량 */ , DFCQTY /* 불량수량 */ , DONAQTY /* 기부수량 */ , ICADDYN FROM TWORK_INFO_IB_DT WHERE CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND OWKEY = #{owkey} AND IBHDKEY = #{ibhdkey}

/* wms-inbound-iborderreturn-sql-oracle.xml - selectReturnLckey - 반품 로케이션 조회 */ SELECT * FROM ( SELECT A.* FROM TWORK_MST_LC A INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_ZN B ON A.CTKEY = B.CTKEY AND A.ZNKEY = B.ZNKEY WHERE A.CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND B.ZNTYPECD = '170' AND A.LCKEY != 'RETURN' ORDER BY LCKEY ) AS sub_1 LIMIT 1

/* wms-inbound-iborderreturn-sql-oracle.xml - selectInboundReturnWblnoSbm - 운송장 접수 내역 조회 */ SELECT CTKEY , CLAIMNO , CUSTORDNO , DLVRYCORPCD , WBLNO , RICUSTORDNO , CONT , INSERTDATE , INSERTURKEY , UPDATEDATE , UPDATEURKEY FROM TWORK_INFO_IBRET_WBLNO_SBM WHERE CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND CUSTORDNO = #{custordno} AND WBLNO = #{wblno}
